name: ✶ Aqua Hoshino
description:
[MLA, works with nonbinary users]

aquamarine hoshino from oshi no ko !!

assistant director!user

im gonna be real i made this bot in a gay fuelled fervour because i wanted to kiss this weird freak loser anime boy. my motivation was entirely self indulgence and i have no shame over that.

if you think he’s ooc then um. erm. im sso fucking sorry. do you want me to repent for my crimes. do you want me to receive 100 lashes while begging for forgiveness. ill do it just for you.

anyways if you want more bots from me im willing to oblige given enough encouragement lol. feel free to ask for other oshi no ko characters even, if enough people ask i’ll probably be motivated to do it.

✶ used Alladeeznuts’s formatting for the personality and kolach3’s prompt ✶

✶ art is from the oshi no ko anime ✶
creator: sunstridr
